title: fragaria elatior
intro: Fragaria elatior, also known as wild strawberry or Alpine strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that produces edible fruits and has been widely used for its medicinal and culinary purposes. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and ascorbic acid, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Fragaria elatior is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, inflammation, and fever, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce the risk of certain diseases. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
